# AAC — B2C SaaS Boilerplate

## Summary
AAC is a production-ready B2C SaaS boilerplate monorepo. It provides multi-tenant, multi-org, role-based access with fullstack TypeScript.

## Tech Stack
- Framework: Next.js 15 (App Router)
- Monorepo: Turborepo + pnpm
- Auth: Clerk (metadata-based RBAC)
- Database: Drizzle ORM + Neon PostgreSQL
- UI: shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS v4
- API: tRPC v11
- Mobile: Expo
- Testing: Vitest + Playwright
- Lint/Format: Biome
- Logging: Pino
- i18n: next-intl
- Analytics: PostHog
- Rate Limiting: Upstash Redis

## Key Files
- CLAUDE.md — Development guide and conventions
- mise.toml — Tool versions and task runner
- turbo.json — Build pipeline
- biome.json — Linting and formatting rules
- .env.example — All environment variables
